title: numeric_range
description: Exercises numeric minimum/maximum and exclusive-bound guides.

strictLowerBound.description: Both minimum and a stricter exclusiveMinimum are present; the stricter (nudged) bound wins.

strictUpperBound.description: Both maximum and a stricter exclusiveMaximum are present; the stricter (nudged) bound wins.

impossibleRange.description: A vacuous constraint: nudging exclusiveMinimum/exclusiveMaximum inward crosses the bounds (no integer satisfies it).
